_note: Demo settings for the website's /model-player page and the sup CLI, keyed by model id. This file lists ONLY the releases the player shows (the latest per series) — update it with each release. Model facts (params, tokenizer, artifacts) stay in registry.json; this holds just what a demo needs: a starter prompt and the release's block_size (from the frozen config.py). Leading whitespace in prompts is LOAD-BEARING — it puts the model in its corpus's format (shakespeare-xl indents dialogue), so don't strip it.

gatsby-nanogpt-2.prompt: Gatsby looked out across the bay

kenosha-kid-nanogpt-2.prompt: You never did the Kenosha Kid
